scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @slidescape/game build && pnpm --filter @slidescape/web build && pnpm --parallel --filter @slidescape/worker --filter @slidescape/web dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @slidescape/game build && pnpm --filter @slidescape/server build && pnpm --filter @slidescape/web build && pnpm --filter @slidescape/worker build
